ee:transform.doc:name: Map Payload to Send Order Bank
Variables to Send Order Bank History

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { BancoPedido_Codigo: vars.orderBankResponse.dealerKey, BancoPedidoHistorico_Data: ((now() >> "America/Sao_Paulo")[0 to 22]) replace "T" with " ", BancoPedidoHistorico_Codigo: "CRI", BancoPedidoHistorico_Observacao: "Banco Pedido Criado via integrador SalesForce", BancoPedidoHistorico_UsuCod: 1641 }
